summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fractal module - Backend API fully functional, Frontend partially functional with Replay mode UI issue

ui_bugs.issue: Replay mode overlay section not rendering properly - data-testid='fractal-overlay-section' not found even though Replay tab is clickable

integration_issues.issue: Cannot verify if graph changes with different horizons (30D, 180D, 365D) because overlay section doesn't render

passed_tests: Backend supports 30D, 180D, 365D aftermathDays parameter (key fix verification)
Backend returns proper match data and distribution series
No garbage text (P10/P25/P50/P75/P90, '1D • window=60') found in interface
Horizon options (30D, 180D, 365D) are visible in UI
Replay tab is clickable after selecting horizon

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All critical API endpoints working, 365D horizon support confirmed
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - UI loads correctly but Replay overlay component has rendering issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix FractalOverlaySection component rendering in Replay mode - the component with data-testid='fractal-overlay-section' is not appearing in DOM even though backend API works correctly. This prevents testing the core feature of horizon switching (30D/180D/365D) that was supposedly fixed.
